stories.title: पेड़ काटेगा तो सांस कैसे लेगा, बेवकूफ?!
stories.description: Neem, Tulsi और Mango Leaf खुद आकर तुझे समझा रहे हैं कि तू environment बर्बाद कर रहा है — और खुद की जिंदगी भी।
stories.tags: environment, nature, desi, awareness, trees, comedy, hindi

modules.video_generation_prompt:
The Neem Leaf character is a fully personified, furious version of itself — marching toward camera, pointing aggressively, SCREAMING its dialogue directly at the viewer. No humans. Camera: smash push-in with slight shake. Character stomps, jabs finger, then screams louder.

ओए सुन रे! मैं Neem Leaf हूँ, हवा साफ करता हूँ, जमीन बचाता हूँ, तू पेड़ काटता है, चुटिया, फिर pollution रोता है, समझ जा वरना तेरा पूरी दम घुटेगा
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious Neem Leaf character standing on a large neem tree branch in its natural environment, surrounded by dense green foliage, textured bark, and soft golden sunlight filtering through leaves. The Neem Leaf has angry scrunched cartoon eyes, a tiny nose, and two small hands, one pointing aggressively at the viewer, stubby legs planted wide in a confrontational stance. The scene is set during late afternoon with warm saturated lighting, highlighting leaf veins and natural textures. Background shows vast greenery fading into slight haze, symbolizing environmental balance. Cinematic low-angle shot looking up at the character, making it appear dominant and intimidating. The leaf looks like it is screaming directly at the viewer, with intense expression and dynamic posture, slight motion blur in leaves indicating wind, adding energy and urgency to the scene.

modules.video_generation_prompt:
The Tulsi Leaf character is a fully personified, furious version of itself — marching toward camera, pointing aggressively, SCREAMING its dialogue directly at the viewer. No humans. Camera: fast zoom-in, slight handheld shake. Character throws hands, groans, then shouts louder.

ओए साले! मैं Tulsi Leaf हूँ, वातावरण शुद्ध करती हूँ, तू कंक्रीट उगाता है, बेवकूफ, फिर बीमारी झेलता है, अभी भी नहीं सुधरा तो सांसें जलेंगी तेरी पूरी जिंदगी भर
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a Tulsi Leaf character in its natural home on a tulsi plant in a small courtyard garden, surrounded by earthen soil, clay pot, and other green leaves. Early morning setting with soft sunlight and gentle glow illuminating the sacred plant. The Tulsi Leaf has furious cartoon eyes, tiny nose, and small hands, one hand pointing straight toward viewer, legs planted firmly. Expression is aggressive and scolding. Background includes subtle temple bell blur and calm environment contrast to character anger. Camera is eye-level close-up with slight depth of field, focusing sharply on the character while background softly fades. Rich green tones dominate, with earthy textures. The leaf appears to be yelling directly at viewer, with dramatic lighting emphasizing its texture and importance in natural ecosystem.

modules.video_generation_prompt:
The Mango Leaf character is a fully personified, furious version of itself — marching toward camera, pointing aggressively, SCREAMING its dialogue directly at the viewer. No humans. Camera: dramatic push-in, slight tilt. Character stomps and slaps forehead before yelling louder.

ओए सुन! मैं Mango Leaf हूँ, पेड़ों का हिस्सा, बारिश संतुलित रखता हूँ, तू जंगल साफ करता है, हरामी, फिर सूखा रोता है, दिमाग इस्तेमाल कर अब वरना सब खत्म
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a Mango Leaf character on a large mango tree branch in a lush orchard environment, surrounded by hanging mangoes, dense canopy, and dappled sunlight filtering through leaves. The scene is vibrant, warm, and rich in tropical colors. The Mango Leaf has angry cartoon eyes, tiny nose, and small arms, one hand aggressively pointing toward viewer, legs planted wide in a confrontational pose. The lighting is bright midday sun with strong highlights and shadows, enhancing realism and depth. Background shows multiple trees fading into distance, symbolizing forest ecosystem. Cinematic low-angle shot to give dominance to character. The leaf appears mid-scream, mouth wide, expression furious, with slight leaf motion suggesting wind and tension in environment.

modules.video_generation_prompt:
All three characters are fully personified, furious versions of themselves — marching together toward camera, pointing aggressively, SCREAMING at the viewer. No humans. Camera: fast zoom-out then smash push-in. They shout in sync, then one screams louder.

ओए गधों! हम Neem Tulsi Mango Leaf हैं, प्रकृति बचाते हैं, तुम काटते हो, बेवकूफ, अब भी नहीं रुके तो धरती खत्म, फिर रोते रहना हमेशा समझे क्या हैं अबे
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render showing Neem Leaf, Tulsi Leaf, and Mango Leaf characters together in a dense natural forest environment blending their ecosystems, with rich greenery, layered foliage, and warm golden sunlight streaming through canopy. All three characters stand in foreground with furious expressions, cartoon eyes scrunched, tiny noses, each pointing aggressively toward viewer with stubby legs planted wide. The environment is vibrant, alive, and symbolic of nature’s balance. Cinematic wide shot slowly pushing in, emphasizing unity and urgency. Leaves slightly moving with wind, adding dynamic feel. Lighting is dramatic with strong highlights and shadows, creating depth. The characters appear to be screaming together directly at viewer, intense, confrontational, and emotionally charged scene with saturated Pixar-style colors.
